commercialTerms.title: Annual billing, cancellation, and refund rules
commercialTerms.subtitle: The same contract applies on pricing, at checkout, and in member settings.

annualBilling.title: Annual billing in v1
annualBilling.body: Memberships are billed annually at launch. Public pricing shows the yearly fee and paid term before checkout starts.

cancellation.title: Cancellation stops the next renewal
cancellation.body: You can cancel renewal at any time. Access stays active until the current paid term ends, and cancellation does not reopen expired benefits.

refundWindow.title: 30-day launch refund window
refundWindow.body: We refund the membership fee if you ask within 30 days of purchase and no staff-led recovery matter has been accepted for that membership yet.

coolingOff.title: Cooling-off rights stay separate
coolingOff.body: Any statutory cooling-off or withdrawal right applies separately from the launch refund promise. Where local law gives a different withdrawal window, that statutory rule controls.

acceptedMatters.title: Accepted escalations survive cancellation
acceptedMatters.body: If Interdomestik has already accepted a recovery matter, the agreed success-fee and escalation terms stay in force for that accepted matter even if the membership later cancels.

footer.title: What the refund covers
footer.body: The launch refund covers the membership fee only. It does not erase fees or partner costs already agreed for an accepted escalation.
